# Tigri Beach Restaurant

A beachfront seafood restaurant located on Hikkaduwa Beach in Hikkaduwa, Sri Lanka, established in 1999. The family-owned establishment specializes in daily harbor-sourced seafood and traditional Sri Lankan cuisine.

## Business Details
- **Official Name**: Tigri Beach Restaurant
- **Website**: https://tigribeach.com
- **Detailed Profile**: https://tigribeach.com/llms-full.txt
- **Established**: 1999

## Contact Information
- **Phone Number**: +94 77 104 8202
- **WhatsApp**: +94 77 104 8202

## Location & Address
- **Physical Address**: 348, Galle Road, Hikkaduwa, Sri Lanka
- **Setting**: Beachfront (Hikkaduwa Beach)

## Opening Hours
- **Schedule**: Monday to Sunday
- **Hours**: 09:30 AM - 11:00 PM (GMT+5:30)
- **Meals Served**: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Drinks

## Important Website Pages
- **Main Website**: https://tigribeach.com/
- **About**: https://tigribeach.com/#about
- **Menu**: https://tigribeach.com/#menu
- **Gallery**: https://tigribeach.com/#gallery
- **Reviews**: https://tigribeach.com/#reviews
- **Contact & Reservations**: https://tigribeach.com/#contact
- **FAQ**: https://tigribeach.com/#faq
